title: Authentication (ASVS L1)
description: Implements the Level 1 verification requirements of ASVS chapter V2 — Authentication. Establishes the baseline application-security controls for this chapter.

tasks.title: Implement ASVS L1 requirements for V2
tasks.description: Put in place the Level 1 verification requirements for Authentication (ASVS chapter V2).

tasks.title: Verify V2 coverage
tasks.description: Periodically verify that the Level 1 requirements for Authentication remain satisfied as the application evolves.
